evaluators.name: Highest-Rated Ergonomic Black Chair Under $250 Added (Qty 1)
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered ergonomic office chairs correctly and added the highest-rated qualifying black chair under $250 with quantity 1 to the active cart.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Color Laser Printer With Duplex & Wi-Fi Quoted (Qty 3)
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched with correct filters for color laser printers with duplex and Wi-Fi under $400 and submitted a quote request for the cheapest qualifying printer with quantity 3.

evaluators.name: Three Different A4 Paper Products (Price $5–$20, Qty 4 Each) in Cart
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered A4 paper correctly and has exactly three different qualifying A4 paper products, each with quantity 4, in the active cart.

evaluators.name: Black Docking Station Compatible with ProBook 450 Saved
evaluators.description: Checks if the user searched with compatibility filters and saved a black docking station compatible with 'ProBook 450' to the saved items list.

evaluators.name: Compare Two 27" Monitors Under $350 and Add Highest Resolution (Qty 2, Standard Shipping)
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered monitors correctly, compared two qualifying 27-inch monitors under $350, and added 2 units of the highest-resolution one with standard shipping to the cart.

evaluators.name: Two Eco-Certified Cleaning Products (Free Shipping, 4+ Stars) Added with Quantities 3 and 2
evaluators.description: Checks if the user filtered eco-certified cleaning products with free shipping and 4+ stars, and added two different qualifying products to the cart with 3 units of the first and 2 of the second.

evaluators.name: Quick Order 50 Units of Gigabit 24-Port Switch and Proceed to Order Summary with Invoice Payment
evaluators.description: Checks if the user used quick order by SKU to add ~50 units of a qualifying gigabit 24-port network switch to the cart and then viewed the order summary with invoice payment selected.

evaluators.name: Schedule Demo for Enterprise Analytics Software in April 2026, Weekday 10:00 AM, 5 Attendees
evaluators.description: Checks if the user scheduled a demo for an analytics software product on a weekday morning in April 2026 at 10:00 AM with 5 attendees.
